note: Lodging and camping by area and comfort tier. tier matches config.json comfortTiers: camp | value | comfort | premium.

lodging.name: Rough Riders Hotel
lodging.blurb: The restored 1885 hotel on Medora's main street — the town's signature stay.

lodging.name: AmericInn by Wyndham Medora
lodging.blurb: Full-comfort hotel with indoor pool at the edge of town.

lodging.name: Badlands Motel
lodging.blurb: Clean, simple and walkable to downtown — a Medora classic.

lodging.name: Elkhorn Quarters
lodging.blurb: Simple suites steps from the main street.

lodging.name: Medora Campground
lodging.blurb: In-town campground with RV hookups and tent sites, walkable to everything.

lodging.name: Cottonwood Campground (TRNP South Unit)
lodging.blurb: The National Park Service campground inside the South Unit, along the Little Missouri.

lodging.name: Juniper Campground (TRNP North Unit)
lodging.blurb: Quiet NPS campground in the North Unit, 70 miles north.

lodging.name: Sully Creek State Park Campground
lodging.blurb: Riverside sites and the Maah Daah Hey trailhead, 3 miles south of town — good for horses.

lodging.name: Red Trail Campground
lodging.blurb: Full-hookup RV and tent camping a block off Medora's main street.

lodging.name: Dickinson chain hotels
lodging.blurb: A cluster of national-brand hotels 40 minutes east — the fallback when Medora is full in peak summer.
